executive_summary: Build failure detected in repository scib_new on branch main. The build process failed during GitHub Actions workflow execution (Run ID: 22731367784). The failure log indicates a generic build failure without detailed Maven error output captured in the build_failure_attempt-1.json file. This suggests either a workflow configuration issue, early-stage build failure before Maven execution, or incomplete log capture.

errors.title: Build Process Failure - Incomplete Log Capture
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow failed to complete successfully, but detailed Maven error logs were not captured in the build failure JSON file. The error message 'Build failed - see action URL for details' indicates that the failure occurred but specific error details were not propagated to the log file.
errors.error_message: Build process failed - see action URL for details
errors.root_cause: Possible causes: (1) Workflow configuration error preventing proper log capture, (2) Early-stage failure before Maven execution begins, (3) GitHub Actions workflow dispatch or execution failure, (4) Missing or misconfigured build.yml workflow file, (5) Authentication or permission issues preventing workflow execution
errors.impact: Complete build failure preventing any code compilation, testing, or deployment. Development workflow is blocked until the root cause is identified and resolved.

recommendations.details: Check .github/workflows/build.yml file exists and is properly configured with Maven build steps and log capture
Access the GitHub Actions run at https://github.com/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/runs/22731367784 to view detailed execution logs and identify the specific failure point
Ensure GitHub Actions has proper permissions to execute workflows and access repository resources
Update workflow to capture and store detailed Maven output, including [ERROR] messages, stack traces, and build phase information

compliance_notes: Build failure logged and tracked. Manual investigation required to access GitHub Actions workflow logs for detailed error analysis. Audit trail: build_failure_attempt-1.json created, error analysis report generated.
next_steps: Access GitHub Actions workflow run logs directly via web interface or API
Identify specific Maven error messages and failure points
Update error analysis with detailed Maven error classification
Implement automated remediation based on specific error category
